title: psoralea dentata
intro: Psoralea dentata, also known as toothed goat's-thorn or toothed psoralea, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It has been used to treat various health issues such as skin conditions, digestive problems, and respiratory issues, and has also been studied for its potential anticancer properties. The herbal preparations of Psoralea dentata include tea, tincture, and decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
